description_long: This object is a classic double-action revolver with a robust, dark metallic frame and a wooden grip. The revolver features a six-chambered cylinder, a prominent trigger guard, and a medium-length barrel with a front sight post. The grip is smoothly contoured and appears to be made of polished wood, providing a comfortable hold. The cylinder and barrel are finished in a glossy black, with subtle metallic highlights and no visible engravings or markings. A single brass-cased bullet is shown alongside the revolver, indicating its ammunition type. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and ease of use.
description: A classic double-action revolver with a glossy black metal frame and a polished wooden grip, accompanied by a single brass-cased bullet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, barrel alignment, and the bullet positioned to the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full profile of the revolver, including the wooden grip, trigger guard, and cylinder, with the bullet below.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip and the cylinder, with the bullet to the left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, including the hammer, trigger guard, and the bullet to the right.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is made of polished wood with a smooth, ergonomic contour that fits comfortably in the hand. It features a rounded backstrap and a gentle palm swell, with no visible checkering or stippling. The surface is glossy, highlighting the natural wood grain, and there are no visible logos, finger grooves, or embellishments, giving it a classic and understated appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, with no integrated accessories or distinctive features.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length with a standard round profile and a smooth, glossy black finish. It is not threaded, ported, or fluted, and there are no compensators or suppressor threads visible. The exterior is unmarked and maintains a clean, utilitarian look.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the revolver's frame or barrel. The surfaces appear smooth and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not have a detachable magazine or magazine base. The cylinder serves as the ammunition chamber, and there is no visible floorplate, finger rest, or related design feature.
